name: Swiss Style Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 3 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, sugar, and chopped onion until well combined.
3. Gradually add sour cream while stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
4. Cook the mixture until thickened, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Fold in the canned green beans and stir to combine.
6. Transfer the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
7. Layer half of the Swiss cheese, then half of the green beans on top.
8. Sprinkle the remaining grated Swiss cheese over the top.
9. In a separate bowl, mix 2 cups of cornflakes with 2 tablespoons of melted butter.
10. Sprinkle the cornflake mixture evenly over the casserole.
11. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
The recipe remains accurate to the original while ensuring clarity, consistency, and safety in presentation.
